question: Technical certifications or personal projects — which is more valuable for landing a tech job?

chatgpt.reason: Certifications validate knowledge while projects demonstrate practical skills.
chatgpt.raw:
VERDICT: Both are equally valuable
REASON: Certifications validate knowledge; projects demonstrate practical skills.

perplexity.reason: Demonstrable, real-world results and portfolio impact matter more to employers.
perplexity.raw: VERDICT: Personal projects often trump certificationsREASON: Demonstrable, real-world results and portfolio impact matter more to employers.

gemini.reason: Projects prove skill while certifications validate knowledge.
gemini.raw: VERDICT: Projects prove skill; certifications validate.

consensus.label: moderate
consensus.summary: All three recognize value in both, but Perplexity prioritizes projects while ChatGPT and Gemini view them as complementary.
